steps.title: Find the central subject
steps.content: The opening sentence announces a runestone discovered in Norway. The carbon dating and Ingrid Zilmer's research interest are supporting details about that discovery, not the main topic.

steps.title: Remove supporting details
steps.content: A introduces battles, which the text never discusses. C focuses on carbon dating, which is only one detail. D focuses on Zilmer, who appears only as someone interested in what the stone can reveal. The passage is mainly about the Norway runestone discovery. The answer is B.
